properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pass me not, O gentle Saviour, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Saviour, Saviour, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let me at Thy throne of mercy Find a sweet relief; Kneeling there in deep contrition, Help my unbelief.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Trusting only in Thy merit, Would I seek Thy face; Heal my wounded, broken spirit, Save me by Thy grace.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Thou the Spring of all my comfort, More than life to me, Whom have I on earth beside Thee? Whom in heaven but Thee?
